items.title: Score up to $893 bundled savings + price cuts on Lectric e-bikes during its Father’s Day Sale starting from $799
items.summary: Lectric has launched its Father’s Day e-bike Sale with up to $893 savings and 15% off accessories, with the main focus being on the Xpedition2 Cargo e-bikes that are getting the biggest savings. During this event, you can find the Xpedition2 Single-Battery e-bike with a $346 FREE bundle at $1,399 shipped, while the Xpedition2 Dual-Battery e-bike comes with a $744 FREE bundle at $1,799 shipped, and the Xpedition2 Long-Range Dual-Battery e-bike gets a $893 FREE bundle at $1,999 shipped. Normally these bundles would run for $1,745, $2,543, and $2,892 without the usual savings on the bundles, which are coming in as the biggest collective savings yet in 2026. These bundles are primarily focused on comfortable passenger-forward accessories, especially for parents who are in need of a new way to shepherd their kids around safely. Head below to check out the full lineup of offers across the brand’s entire fleet.

Head below to get the full rundown on extra savings during this sale, as well as to browse the full lineup of deals.

Buy for $14 (Reg. $22)

What we love

SD cards are useful for a lot of things, but for me the most common place I rely on them is security cameras. items.title: Stock up while six Matter-certified RGB smart bulbs are only $5 each (30% off)
items.summary:
Linkind Matter Smart Light Bulb (6-pack)

Buy for $30 (Reg. $43)

What we love

For the last couple of years now, each time I need to replace a smart bulb, I’ve been using these lights from Linkind. I scoop them up when they’re priced like this and wind up only spending $5 each. It’s a solid value if you ask me, undercutting the big brands by huge margins.

items.title: Skip bulky smart plugs and grab Matter in-wall outlets with energy monitoring for $21 a pop
items.summary:
Tapo Matter In-Wall Outlet with Energy Monitoring

Buy for $21 (Reg. $26)

What we love

Smart plugs are great, but you know what’s better? A smart in-wall outlet. This offering even sports built-in energy monitoring too, paving the way for you to keep tabs on why your energy usage may be trending up. Matter support means this unit works with all the major players like Apple, Google, Alexa, and more.
